checklist_item.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Is keccak256 deterministic and collision-resistant?
checklist_item.test_procedure: 1. Hash same input multiple times. 2. Verify identical 32-byte output. 3. Verify against known keccak256 test vectors. 4. Check for library version/configuration issues.
checklist_item.notes: Source: PROP-0012, Trust Boundary: tb-005. CRITICAL - any inconsistency breaks all trie operations.

checklist_item.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Is keccak256 collision resistance maintained?
checklist_item.test_procedure: 1. Verify 128-bit collision resistance is intact. 2. Monitor for cryptanalytic advances. 3. Test address collision scenarios (theoretical). 4. Confirm collision would allow state overwrites.
checklist_item.notes: Source: PROP-0013, Trust Boundary: tb-005, tb-007. CRITICAL - collision enables fund theft.

checklist_item.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Is encode_node type dispatch correct?
checklist_item.test_procedure: 1. Test each type: Account, LegacyTransaction, Receipt, Withdrawal, U256, Bytes. 2. Verify correct dispatch path for each. 3. Test fallback to previous_trie.encode_node. 4. Check isinstance chain ordering.
checklist_item.notes: Source: PROP-0014, Trust Boundary: tb-003. Bug bounty eligible.

checklist_item.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Is previous_trie fallback encoding compatible?
checklist_item.test_procedure: 1. Identify types that fall through to previous_trie. 2. Verify encoding produces non-empty bytes. 3. Check RLP-encodability of output. 4. Test cross-fork encoding consistency.
checklist_item.notes: Source: PROP-0015, Trust Boundary: tb-003. Bug bounty eligible.

checklist_item.title: Does copy_trie produce a fully independent copy?
checklist_item.test_procedure: 1. Copy trie and modify the copy. 2. Verify original is unchanged. 3. Test with various value types. 4. Verify state snapshot/revert behavior.
checklist_item.notes: Source: PROP-0016. Failed transaction reverts would not work correctly.

checklist_item.title: Does trie_set correctly delete keys when value equals default?
checklist_item.test_procedure: 1. Set key to value, then set to trie.default. 2. Verify key is absent from _data. 3. Test with storage slot zero (common deletion case). 4. Verify no ghost entry persists.
checklist_item.notes: Source: PROP-0018. Bug bounty eligible.

checklist_item.title: Is trie_set a no-op when deleting non-existent key?
checklist_item.test_procedure: 1. Set non-existent key to trie.default. 2. Verify _data is unchanged. 3. Check root() before and after (should be identical). 4. Test with various key formats.
checklist_item.notes: Source: PROP-0019. Bug bounty eligible.

checklist_item.title: Does trie_get return trie.default for unset keys?
checklist_item.test_procedure: 1. Get key that was never set. 2. Verify return value is exactly trie.default. 3. Test identity comparison (not just equality). 4. Test various key formats.
checklist_item.notes: Source: PROP-0020. Bug bounty eligible.

checklist_item.title: Are nibble values validated to be in range [0, 15]?
checklist_item.test_procedure: 1. Check bytes_to_nibble_list output range. 2. Look for code paths bypassing nibble conversion. 3. Test nibble_list_to_compact with out-of-range values. 4. Verify bit masking guarantees.
checklist_item.notes: Source: PROP-0023. Conditional scope - normally guaranteed by bytes_to_nibble_list.

checklist_item.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Is compact encoding header byte correct?
checklist_item.test_procedure: 1. Test even-length leaf (expect 0x20). 2. Test even-length extension (expect 0x00). 3. Test odd-length leaf (expect 0x3X). 4. Test odd-length extension (expect 0x1X). 5. Verify Merkle proof compatibility.
checklist_item.notes: Source: PROP-0024, Trust Boundary: tb-006. CRITICAL - incorrect header breaks proofs.

checklist_item.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Does empty trie produce EMPTY_TRIE_ROOT?
checklist_item.test_procedure: 1. Create empty trie and compute root(). 2. Verify result equals keccak256(rlp.encode(b'')). 3. Test after deleting all entries from non-empty trie. 4. Verify newly created accounts have correct empty storage root.
checklist_item.notes: Source: PROP-0028, Trust Boundary: tb-006. CRITICAL - affects all accounts.

checklist_item.title: Does single-element trie produce correct LeafNode?
checklist_item.test_procedure: 1. Create trie with single key-value. 2. Verify patricialize returns LeafNode. 3. Check key suffix matches key[level:]. 4. Test contracts with single storage slot.
checklist_item.notes: Source: PROP-0029. Bug bounty eligible.

checklist_item.title: Are ExtensionNodes correctly constructed for shared prefixes?
checklist_item.test_procedure: 1. Create keys with common prefix. 2. Verify ExtensionNode key_segment equals shared prefix. 3. Verify subnode is recursive patricialize result. 4. Check level increment equals prefix length.
checklist_item.notes: Source: PROP-0030. Bug bounty eligible.

checklist_item.title: Are BranchNodes correctly constructed with 16 subnodes?
checklist_item.test_procedure: 1. Create keys with no shared prefix at current level. 2. Verify BranchNode has exactly 16 subnodes. 3. Verify each subnode contains only keys with matching nibble. 4. Test key distribution correctness.
checklist_item.notes: Source: PROP-0031. Bug bounty eligible.

checklist_item.title: Is Account/Receipt/Uint rejected at BranchNode value position?
checklist_item.test_procedure: 1. Identify conditions where len(key) == level. 2. Test with Account/Receipt/Uint at this position. 3. Verify AssertionError is raised. 4. Test edge cases in secured tries.
checklist_item.notes: Source: PROP-0032. Conditional scope - unusual state configuration required.

checklist_item.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Does root() always return exactly 32 bytes?
checklist_item.test_procedure: 1. Compute root() for various trie states. 2. Verify all results are exactly 32 bytes. 3. Test small tries where RLP < 32 bytes. 4. Verify correct hashing for small root nodes.
checklist_item.notes: Source: PROP-0033, Trust Boundary: tb-006. CRITICAL - non-32-byte root breaks headers.

checklist_item.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Are pathological trie structures prevented?
checklist_item.test_procedure: 1. Test unsecured tries with crafted keys. 2. Measure depth/balance of resulting structures. 3. Benchmark root computation time. 4. Verify secured tries mitigate via key hashing.
checklist_item.notes: Source: PROP-0034, Trust Boundary: tb-001, tb-007. Bug bounty eligible.

checklist_item.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Are new types explicitly handled, not falling through?
checklist_item.test_procedure: 1. Review isinstance chain for all expected types. 2. Verify no unintended fallthrough to previous_trie. 3. Test fork upgrade scenarios. 4. Check for new types added in Fusaka.
checklist_item.notes: Source: PROP-0035, Trust Boundary: tb-003. Bug bounty eligible.

checklist_item.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Is state growth bounded by gas costs?
checklist_item.test_procedure: 1. Craft transactions maximizing state entries per gas. 2. Measure actual state growth vs gas spent. 3. Verify SSTORE/CREATE gas costs match spec. 4. Test root computation time bounds.
checklist_item.notes: Source: PROP-0038, Trust Boundary: tb-001, tb-006. Bug bounty eligible.

checklist_item.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Are small root nodes hashed to 32 bytes?
checklist_item.test_procedure: 1. Create trie with minimal entries. 2. Verify root_node with RLP < 32 bytes is hashed. 3. Verify final root is 32 bytes. 4. Test various small trie configurations.
checklist_item.notes: Source: PROP-0040, Trust Boundary: tb-006. CRITICAL - short root breaks headers.

checklist_item.title: Does _prepare_trie process ALL entries in trie._data?
checklist_item.test_procedure: 1. Count entries before and after _prepare_trie. 2. Verify no entries are skipped. 3. Check exception handling for potential silent failures. 4. Test with various value types.
checklist_item.notes: Source: PROP-0041. CRITICAL - skipped entries cause state loss.

checklist_item.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Are secured trie key collisions prevented?
checklist_item.test_procedure: 1. Verify keccak256 collision resistance. 2. Test _prepare_trie output for key uniqueness. 3. Verify second entry would overwrite first on collision. 4. Confirm collision is computationally infeasible.
checklist_item.notes: Source: PROP-0042, Trust Boundary: tb-005, tb-007. CRITICAL - collision enables theft.

checklist_item.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Is root computation order-independent?
checklist_item.test_procedure: 1. Test with different dict iteration orders (if possible). 2. Verify patricialize produces canonical structure regardless of order. 3. Compare roots from different orderings. 4. Test across Python versions.
checklist_item.notes: Source: PROP-0044, Trust Boundary: tb-006. CRITICAL - order-dependence causes splits.

checklist_item.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Are Accounts correctly routed through encode_node?
checklist_item.test_procedure: 1. Trace Account encoding path in _prepare_trie. 2. Verify isinstance(value, Account) check. 3. Test with Account-like but non-Account objects. 4. Verify storage root is included for Accounts only.
checklist_item.notes: Source: PROP-0046, Trust Boundary: tb-002. CRITICAL - misclassification corrupts state.

checklist_item.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Is root() cross-implementation compatible?
checklist_item.test_procedure: 1. Compare root() output against other Ethereum clients. 2. Test with known state configurations. 3. Run consensus test vectors. 4. Verify against official test suites.
checklist_item.notes: Source: PROP-0047, Trust Boundary: tb-006. CRITICAL - divergence breaks network.
